items.value: For generations, rice fields have supported our people and shaped our culture.
Yet many students have never experienced the hidden world within a real rice field.
Beneath the rice plants lies a thriving ecosystem.
Others are essential to the ecosystem.
A smooth-skinned amphibian with long jumping legs and bulging eyes.
An aquatic animal with fins, scales, and gills for breathing underwater.
A feathered animal with wings, a beak, and the ability to fly.
A small beetle with six legs and distinctive red wings with black spots.
A slow-moving mollusk with a single muscular foot and a coiled shell on its back.
An arachnid with eight legs and the ability to spin silk webs.
An insect with six legs and enlarged hind legs specialized for jumping.
An insect with two pairs of dull-colored wings and a narrow waist.
